text:
Once upon a time there was an old traveler named Harold.

He traveled through forests.

And through wide oceans.

He roamed mountains high.

Harold loved stories.

So he traveled far.

And listened hard.

Maybe he'd hear?

There was nothing strange?

Perhaps there would?

Yes.

One day Harold heard.

An old town.

A village?

People there told stories.

Every night birds?

Or owls?

No. Owls they chose.

Harold flew.

Oh wow!

Some birds flew too!

They told tales?

Like folk?

Every kind.

Birdsong!

They sang!

So Harold spun.

That's my dream?

One night.

Just imagine?

Or look!

Maybe just hear?

That owl knew.

The stories.

That's me?

I think so.

I'd believe.

Just listen.

Let's go.




There. Just listen.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
